slots.title: Markdown Test
slots.body:
Here is a paragraph with **bold**, *italic*, and ~~strikethrough~~ text. You can also write `inline code`.

> This is a blockquote.
> It can span multiple lines.

Here is an unordered list:
- Item 1
- Item 2 with a nested code block:
  ```
  let x = 10;
  let y = 20;
  ```
- Item 3

And an ordered list:
1. First step
2. Second step

End of test.
